audit_items.proof_trace: Exactly two callers of GetBlobStreamHandler() exist in the codebase (QueueAuthenticPixelsStream at stream.c:915 and SyncAuthenticPixelsStream at stream.c:2734); both immediately NULL-check the return value before invoking the function pointer and return an error if NULL. The one direct access to image->blob->stream in WriteBlob() (blob.c:5338) is safe by design: the FifoStream blob type is only assigned in OpenBlob() when image_info->stream is already non-NULL (blob.c:2882-2887).
